name: NATIONAL BEVERAGE CORP
business: National Beverage Corp. sells a portfolio of sparkling waters, juices, energy drinks, and carbonated soft drinks, primarily focused on healthier beverages. The company serves customers in the United States through a hybrid distribution system including warehouse and direct-store delivery.
sellsTo: food-service outlets (hospitals, schools, military bases, hotels)

exposures.sentence: National Beverage Corp. innovatively refreshes America with a distinctive portfolio of sparkling waters, juices, energy drinks and, to a lesser extent, carbonated soft drinks.
Cybersecurity and dependence on information technology and third-party service providers.
